use_cases: Indicates loading or processing states during async operations
Provides visual feedback while waiting for data to fetch
Shows progress indication in forms, dashboards, or content areas
Displays processing status during user interactions
Signals background operations in dev-tools or admin interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight loading spinner component featuring 12 animated bars arranged in a circular pattern. The bars rotate continuously with staggered animation delays creating a smooth cascading effect. Supports customizable size and color through CSS variables, making it suitable for any loading state across SaaS applications, e-commerce platforms, or developer tools.
